channel.title: Kamel Khimeche on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Kamel Khimeche on LMI

item.title: Isothermal Vapor Pressures Of Three Binary Systems: N-Tetradecane Plus Methyl Dodecanoate, Methyl Tetradecanoate, Or Methyl Hexadecanoate Between 353.15 And 453.15 K

Experimental Vapor Pressures (From 1 Pa To 100 Kpa) Of Six Saturated Fatty Acid Methyl Esters (Fames): Methyl Hexanoate, Methyl Octanoate, Methyl Decanoate, Methyl Dodecanoate, Methyl Tetradecanoate And Methyl Hexadecanoate
